creator: empty.japan
caption:
Who is Fuji-san otaku here? I’ll start with myself 👋 I think that it is the most beautiful thing on the planet. I could simply sit and watch it for hours… if only it would ever stop playing hide and seek 🥲 Cannot believe that I haven’t seen it for almost 3 years, except from a shinkansen window 🫠
What is it about Japan that you miss the most?
